Tests the `concat` method of the `String` object in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the functionality of the `concat` method in JavaScript's `String` object. It verifies that concatenating the string `"d"` to the string `"abc"` results in the string `"abcd"`. The use of `assert` indicates that this code is likely part of a test suite to ensure the correct behavior of string operations. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on validating the `concat` method's output.
